sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: McKesson Secures New $2 Billion Senior Credit Facilities
feed.summary: McKesson (MCK) has secured new senior credit facilities totaling $2 billion, involving a term loan A-1, a term loan A-2, and a revolving credit facility, with JPMorgan Chase leading the syndicate of lenders. These facilities come with leverage- and rating-based pricing and covenants. An analyst has rated MCK stock as a Buy with a $1000.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, also rates it as Outperform due to strong fundamentals and cash generation.

feed.title: 10,143 Shares in Illinois Tool Works Inc. $ITW Purchased by Y.D. More Investments Ltd
feed.summary: Y.D. More Investments Ltd recently acquired 10,143 shares of Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE:ITW) in Q4, valued at approximately $2.50 million, bringing institutional ownership to nearly 80%. The company reported strong Q4 earnings, beating analyst estimates with $2.72 EPS on $4.09 billion revenue, and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.61. Despite recent insider selling and a "Reduce" consensus rating from analysts, Illinois Tool Works provided optimistic FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Y.D. More Investments Ltd Purchases Shares of 19,643 Emerson Electric Co. $EMR
feed.summary: Y.D. More Investments Ltd acquired a new position in Emerson Electric Co. (NYSE:EMR) during the fourth quarter, buying 19,643 shares valued at approximately $2.61 million. Emerson Electric reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing EPS estimates, and has provided positive guidance for FY2026 and Q2 2026. Despite some insider selling, institutional ownership remains high at 74.3%, and analysts currently maintain a "Hold" rating with an average price target of $163.43.

feed.title: Evercore Maintains Diamondback Energy(FANG.US) With Buy Rating, Raises Target Price to $255
feed.summary: Evercore analyst Stephen Richardson has reiterated a "buy" rating for Diamondback Energy (FANG.US) and increased the target price from $175 to $255. Richardson has a 64.2% success rate and an average return of 11.7% over the past year, according to TipRanks data. This information is intended for informational purposes only and is not an investment recommendation.

feed.title: Greenpro Capital Corp. Successfully Acquires Stake in AI Forekast Limited, an Augmented Intelligence Provider
feed.summary: Greenpro Capital Corp. (NASDAQ:GRNQ) has completed a strategic share exchange with Forekast Limited, an AI and augmented intelligence data analytics provider. This acquisition aligns with Greenpro's goal to expand its AI-enabled financial platforms and strengthens its position in digital finance. Forekast brings approximately $21 million in annual revenue to Greenpro, which issued 8,500,000 restricted shares of common stock for an equity interest in Forekast.

feed.title: Greenpro Capital Corp. Successfully Acquires Stake in AI Forekast Limited, an Augmented Intelligence Provider
feed.summary: Greenpro Capital Corp. (NASDAQ: GRNQ) has completed a strategic share exchange with Forekast Limited, an AI and augmented intelligence data analytics provider, acquiring an equity interest for 8.5 million restricted common shares. This acquisition aligns with Greenpro's strategy to expand its AI-enabled financial platforms and strengthens its digital finance position. Forekast generates approximately $21 million in annual revenue, and the transaction is expected to accelerate Greenpro's revenue growth and enhance shareholder value.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Ameriprise Financial Price Target to $490 From $538, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has lowered its price target for Ameriprise Financial (AMP) to $490 from $538, while reiterating a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook by the investment bank. Another firm, BMO Capital, also revised its price target for Ameriprise Financial to $470 from $560, maintaining a Market Perform rating.

feed.title: Western Financial Corp CA Purchases New Stake in Lam Research Corporation $LRCX
feed.summary: Western Financial Corp CA has acquired a new stake of 7,308 shares, valued at $1.25 million, in Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) during Q4. Despite recent insider selling totaling $29.66 million, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $245.35. Lam Research also reported strong Q4 results, surpassing earnings expectations with $1.27 EPS and revenue of $5.34 billion, and announced a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Intercontinental Exchange Reports March and First Quarter 2026 Statistics
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE: ICE) reported record trading volumes for March and the first quarter of 2026, driven by strong performance in energy and financial markets. The company saw record average daily volume across commodities, energy, oil, and interest rates, and expects increased operating expenses for Q1 and full year 2026 due to robust revenues from these trading volumes. ICE emphasized its role in providing liquidity and risk management tools in a rapidly changing market environment.

feed.title: Western Financial Corp CA Sells 6,926 Shares of Cintas Corporation $CTAS
feed.summary: Western Financial Corp CA has reduced its stake in Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ:CTAS) by 40.6% in the fourth quarter, selling 6,926 shares, though still retaining 10,145 shares valued at approximately $1.908 million. Despite this reduction, institutional investors collectively own 63.46% of Cintas, with many major funds like Vanguard and State Street increasing their holdings. Analysts generally rate Cintas as a "Hold" with a consensus price target of $215.17, while the company recently reported Q4 EPS of $1.24 and an 8.9% year-over-year revenue increase.

feed.title: Stephens Adjusts C.H. Robinson Worldwide PT to $215 From $225, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Stephens has adjusted its price target for C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) to $215, down from $225, while retaining an "Overweight" rating on the stock. C.H. Robinson Worldwide is a leading provider of transportation and logistical services, with multi-mode transportation accounting for the majority of its net sales. The company recently presented at various conferences and continues to offer services like discount fuel cards and cash advances for fuel.

feed.title: Aptiv (NYSE: APTV) retires over $1.37B of long-dated notes via tender
feed.summary: Aptiv PLC has successfully completed a cash tender offer, repurchasing over $1.37 billion of its outstanding senior notes through its subsidiary, Aptiv Swiss Holdings Limited. This tender offer was contingent upon the completion of the spin-off of its Electrical Distribution Systems business into Versigent and receiving a special dividend of at least $1.7 billion from Versigent, both of which have been met. The accepted notes, concentrated in 2032-2054 maturities, aim to reduce future interest expenses and refine Aptiv's maturity profile.

feed.title: Stephens Adjusts CSX Price Target to $47 From $42, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Stephens has raised its price target for CSX Corporation (CSX) to $47 from $42, while reiterating an Overweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook by the analyst firm on the freight transportation company. The article also notes recent adjustments to CSX's price target and ratings by other financial institutions, including BMO Capital, Rothschild & Co Redburn, and Bernstein.

feed.title: A Look At Las Vegas Sands (LVS) Valuation As Recent Returns Send Mixed Signals
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands (LVS) shows mixed signals with recent returns; a 5.3% gain in 7 days contrasts with a 14.8% decline over 90 days, though 1-year returns are up 72.8%. The stock is trading at $54.34, with one valuation model suggesting it is 18% undervalued at $65.85, attributing this to the full ramp-up of The Londoner in Macao and strong performance from Marina Bay Sands in Singapore. However, a discounted cash flow (DCF) model estimates its fair value at a much lower $28.62, implying the stock is currently expensive.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts PT on Raymond James Financial to $188 From $190, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has updated its price target for Raymond James Financial, decreasing it slightly to $188 from $190, while reiterating a "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a minor change in outlook for the financial services company. Other financial institutions like BMO Capital and Jefferies also recently adjusted their price targets and ratings for Raymond James Financial.

feed.title: Guggenheim Issues Positive Forecast for Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE:LYV) Stock Price
feed.summary: Guggenheim boosted its price target for Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE:LYV) to $192 from $180, maintaining a "buy" rating and implying a 23.11% upside. This positive forecast is echoed by other analysts, resulting in a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average target of $185.19, despite the company missing EPS but exceeding revenue expectations in its latest quarter. Insider selling by a director was noted, while institutional investors have actively traded Live Nation shares.

feed.title: Northern Trust (NASDAQ:NTRS) Upgraded to "Neutral" at The Goldman Sachs Group
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group upgraded Northern Trust (NASDAQ:NTRS) from a "sell" to a "neutral" rating, increasing its price target to $151, which suggests a 6.15% upside. This follows the company's strong Q4 performance, where it exceeded EPS expectations and reported an 8.4% rise in revenue year-over-year. Despite mixed insider activity, institutional investors hold a significant stake in the company.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Adjusts Price Target on Bio-Techne to $54 From $68, Maintains In Line Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has revised its price target for Bio-Techne (NASDAQ: TECH) down to $54 from $68, while keeping an "In Line" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a change in the analyst's outlook for the biotechnology and medical research company. The article also lists recent news regarding Bio-Techne, including product expansions and presentations at healthcare conferences.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Adjusts PT on Essex Property Trust to $264 From $269, Maintains In Line Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has adjusted its price target for Essex Property Trust (ESS) to $264, down from $269, while maintaining an "In Line" rating. This update reflects a change in the analyst's valuation for the residential REIT. The article also lists recent analyst adjustments and company news for Essex Property Trust.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Adjusts PT on AvalonBay Communities to $191 From $202, Maintains In Line Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has adjusted its price target for AvalonBay Communities (AVB) to $191, down from $202, while maintaining an "In Line" rating for the stock. This update reflects an analyst's revised outlook on the residential REIT. The article also lists recent news and other analyst recommendations concerning AvalonBay Communities.

feed.title: Western Financial Corp CA Purchases 5,949 Shares of Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. $AMD
feed.summary: Western Financial Corp CA increased its stake in Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) by 23.7% in Q4, acquiring 5,949 shares to own a total of 31,103 shares valued at approximately $6.66 million. This makes AMD the firm's fourth-largest holding. The semiconductor company recently beat earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $1.53 against an estimate of $1.32 and revenue of $10.27 billion, a 34.1% year-over-year increase. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $290.53, despite recent insider share sales.

feed.title: Apple (AAPL) closes above ___ on April 7? Trading Odds & Predictions
feed.summary: This Polymarket prediction market focuses on whether Apple Inc. (AAPL) will close above specific price targets on April 7, 2026. Current trading odds indicate a high probability for AAPL to close above $245, with $265 having a 51% chance, reflecting current trader sentiment and market analysis. Resolution will be based on Yahoo Finance's official closing prices, with provisions for market disruptions, stock splits, and other corporate actions.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. (Class A) stock: Why cloud growth makes it a standout buy now
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. (Class A) is highlighted as a strong buy due to its Google Cloud business achieving 48% revenue growth in Q4 2025 and a $240 billion backlog, signaling a significant AI competitive edge. While advertising remains a core revenue driver, the cloud segment's expansion offers diversified, high-margin growth. Analysts view the stock positively, emphasizing its AI integration and reasonable forward P/E, making it an attractive long-term investment despite potential short-term volatility and regulatory scrutiny.

feed.title: HDFC Bank (HDB) director discloses 2,199,974-share equity stake
feed.summary: HDFC Bank Ltd director Mistry Keki M. has filed an initial Form 3, disclosing a direct ownership of 2,199,974 Equity Shares in the company. This filing acts as a baseline for future insider transaction disclosures and does not report any recent purchase or sale of shares. The Form 3 was filed late due to administrative delays in obtaining EDGAR filing credentials.

feed.title: McKesson Secures $2.0 Billion Senior Secured Credit Facilities Led by JPMorgan
feed.summary: McKesson (MCK) has established new senior secured credit facilities totaling $2.0 billion. These facilities include a $750 million Term Loan A-1, a $250 million Term Loan A-2, and a $1.0 billion revolving credit facility, with initial interest rates tied to Adjusted Term SOFR and Term Benchmark Rate. JPMorgan Chase Bank is the administrative agent, and these facilities are secured by substantially all company assets, aiming to enhance McKesson's liquidity and financial flexibility.

feed.title: Where Will Super Micro Computer Stock Be in 5 Years?
feed.summary: This article discusses the future of Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ: SMCI) stock, emphasizing its AI growth potential alongside a current challenge to its credibility. The piece suggests that how this tension resolves will determine if the stock rebounds or remains undervalued. It also highlights that Super Micro Computer was not among The Motley Fool Stock Advisor's top 10 stock recommendations despite its AI relevance.

feed.title: RBC Capital reiterates Rollins stock rating citing growth outlook By Investing.com
feed.summary: RBC Capital has reiterated an Outperform rating on Rollins Inc. (NYSE:ROL) and set a $67.00 price target, despite the stock trading above its Fair Value estimate. The firm anticipates near-term organic growth challenges in Q1 2026 due to branch closures but expects recurring organic revenue to accelerate throughout the fiscal year, remaining above 7%. Rollins' business model is highlighted as a compelling defensive investment due to its insulation from economic cycles and resistance to AI disruption, further supported by 23 consecutive years of dividend increases.

feed.title: Blackstone to sell 11 million shares of Legence in offering By Investing.com
feed.summary: Affiliates of Blackstone Inc. are planning to sell 11 million shares of Legence Corp.'s Class A common stock through a secondary public offering. Legence will not receive any proceeds from this sale, though it will cover associated costs excluding underwriting fees. This announcement follows recent positive analyst revisions for Legence, with firms like Stifel, RBC Capital, BMO Capital, Bernstein SocGen Group, and BofA Securities raising their price targets due to strong financial performance and growth in its data centers and technology segment.

feed.title: Hillman Solutions acquires Campbell Chain & Fittings By Investing.com
feed.summary: Hillman Solutions Corp. has acquired Campbell Chain & Fittings from Apex Tool Group, LLC, expanding its manufacturing capabilities and chain product portfolio. This acquisition is expected to add over $20 million in net sales for Hillman's 2026 fiscal year and follows their 2024 purchase of Koch Industries, further strengthening their presence in the industrial MRO channel. The company maintains a market capitalization of $1.58 billion and shows promising growth prospects according to analyst ratings despite recent price target adjustments.

feed.title: Oracle Taps Schneider Electric Executive as New CFO
feed.summary: Oracle Corp. has appointed Hilary Maxson, an executive from Schneider Electric SE, as its new chief financial officer. The appointment is effective immediately, and Maxson will report directly to Clay Magouyrk, one of Oracle's co-CEOs.

feed.title: Boeing Company stock: What investors need to know amid recovery signs
feed.summary: Boeing is showing signs of recovery, with its shares hovering around $208, backed by a $435 billion order backlog and stabilizing 737 MAX production. The company's dual commercial and defense segments provide stability as commercial aviation rebounds. While financial challenges remain, analysts are cautiously optimistic, pointing to long-term growth potential amidst execution risks and supply chain issues.

feed.title: Blackstone to sell 11 million shares of Legence in offering
feed.summary: Affiliates of Blackstone Inc. are planning to sell 11 million shares of Legence Corp.'s Class A common stock in a secondary public offering. Legence will not receive any proceeds from this sale, although it will cover associated costs except for underwriting discounts. This announcement follows several analyst upgrades for Legence due to strong financial performance, with various firms raising their price targets for the company.

feed.title: [8-K] MCKESSON CORP Reports Material Event
feed.summary: McKesson Corporation's subsidiaries, including McKesson Medical-Surgical Top Holdings, have entered into new senior secured credit facilities totaling $2.0 billion. These facilities comprise two term loans ($750.0M due 2031, $250.0M due 2028) and a $1,000.0 million revolving credit facility maturing in 2031. The loans are secured by substantially all assets of the borrower and certain U.S. subsidiaries, bearing variable interest rates tied to market benchmarks and incorporating customary financial covenants and tests.

feed.title: Leidos Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call for May 5, 2026, at 8 a.m. (ET)
feed.summary: Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LDOS) announced it will host a conference call on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 8 a.m. ET to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results. The company plans to release its quarterly earnings press release before the call. A live and replayed audio broadcast, along with related materials, will be available on the Leidos Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Ford CEO Compensation Rises 11% to $27.5M Amid High Recall Volume | 2025 Pay Analysis - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley's total compensation for 2025 increased by almost 11% to $27.5 million, the highest since he became CEO in late 2020. This pay raise occurred despite Ford setting a historic recall figure in the prior year. While his base salary remained unchanged, a significant portion of the increase came from a 255% rise in nonequity incentives, as the company achieved 130% of its bonus targets, including a maximum 200% payout for quality targets on newer vehicles, even as overall recall volumes remain high.

feed.title: Hologic (NASDAQ: HOLX) CEO exit tied to Blackstone, TPG buyout
feed.summary: Hologic, Inc. announced that CEO Steve MacMillan will retire immediately upon the closing of its go-private merger with affiliates of Blackstone and TPG, which is expected around April 7, 2026. All necessary regulatory approvals have been secured for the transaction. MacMillan's 12-year tenure saw significant growth in revenue, EPS, and share price, and his successor is anticipated to be announced upon the merger's completion.

feed.title: Truist Financial Maintains BeiGene(ONC.US) With Buy Rating, Announces Target Price $412
feed.summary: Truist Financial has reaffirmed its Buy rating on BeiGene (ONC.US) and set a target price of $412. This indicates a continued positive outlook from the firm regarding BeiGene's stock performance.

feed.title: Alliant Energy sets April 30 earnings release, May 1 webcast
feed.summary: Alliant Energy (NASDAQ: LNT) has scheduled its first-quarter earnings release for Thursday, April 30th, after market close. A conference call to review the results will be held on Friday, May 1st, at 9 a.m. CT, and will be webcast live on the company's investor relations website. The call will be hosted by CEO Lisa Barton and CFO Robert Durian.

feed.title: Leidos will release quarterly results before an 8 a.m. May 5 call
feed.summary: Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) has scheduled its First Quarter 2026 earnings conference call for May 5, 2026, at 8 a.m. ET to report results for the period ending April 3, 2026. The company will issue its quarterly earnings release before the call and provide a live webcast and replay, with an archived version available through May 5, 2027. This announcement follows Leidos's consistent pattern of pre-announcing earnings calls, which have historically led to modest stock price movements.

feed.title: Sleep apnea pill developer gets $150M as U.S. filing nears
feed.summary: Apnimed, a pharmaceutical company, has secured up to $150 million in debt financing from HealthCare Royalty Partners. This funding will support the commercial launch of AD109, an oral pill for obstructive sleep apnea (OSA), pending FDA approval. The company plans to submit a New Drug Application (NDA) for AD109 later this quarter, following positive Phase 3 trial results.

feed.title: Gartner's June cyber summit brings 62 experts, 110+ sessions on AI
feed.summary: Gartner has announced its Security & Risk Management Summit, scheduled for June 1-3, 2026, in National Harbor, MD. The event will feature 62 Gartner experts and over 110 research-driven sessions, focusing on how cybersecurity leaders can adapt to AI, navigate an expanding threat landscape, and address critical organizational challenges. Key topics include AI in cybersecurity, risk management, cloud security, and identity and access management.

feed.title: CrowdStrike’s managed detection service drew a 98% recommend score
feed.summary: CrowdStrike has been recognized as a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights™ ‘Voice of the Customer’ for Managed Detection and Response (MDR) report. Their Falcon Complete service achieved a 98% willingness to recommend score, based on customer feedback highlighting its 24/7 expert monitoring, AI-driven threat detection, and rapid remediation capabilities. CrowdStrike emphasizes its "Agentic MDR" approach, combining human expertise with intelligent automation to combat AI-powered cyber threats effectively.

feed.title: NiCE is the Only Vendor Named a Gartner Customers’ Choice in Voice of the Customer for Contact Center as a Service Report
feed.summary: NiCE has been recognized for the third time as the only vendor named a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights Voice of the Customer for Contact Center as a Service (CCaaS) report. This distinction is based on excellent customer feedback, with NiCE receiving an overall rating of 4.6 out of 5 from 82 reviews, and 86% of customers recommending the company. Jeff Comstock, President of CX Product & Technology at NiCE, highlighted the company's commitment to innovation and reliable enterprise-grade AI as key to fostering customer confidence and significant results.

feed.title: TOWER TRUST & INVESTMENT Co Has $678,000 Stake in Honeywell International Inc. $HON
feed.summary: TOWER TRUST & INVESTMENT Co significantly reduced its stake in Honeywell International Inc. by 58.6% in Q4, now holding 3,476 shares valued at $678,000. Despite this, other institutional investors have increased their positions in Honeywell. The company reported strong Q4 earnings, beating expectations, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with insider selling also noted.

feed.title: Hologic's CEO will retire as Blackstone-TPG buyout nears close
feed.summary: Hologic, Inc. announced that its long-time Chairman, President, and CEO, Steve MacMillan, will retire upon the closing of its go-private transaction with Blackstone and TPG. The transaction is expected to close around April 7, 2026, after receiving all necessary regulatory approvals. MacMillan led Hologic for over 12 years, during which the company saw significant growth in revenue, non-GAAP earnings per share, share price, and workforce.

feed.title: Suriname offshore plan starts early with Halliburton, PETRONAS and Valaris
feed.summary: Halliburton has announced a Strategic Collaboration Agreement with PETRONAS Suriname Exploration & Production BV and Valaris to support the development of PETRONAS Suriname’s assets. This collaboration aims for early engagement in the development lifecycle to enhance project readiness, execution performance, and long-term value creation. The partnership leverages PETRONAS Suriname’s basin expertise, Valaris’ offshore drilling capabilities, and Halliburton’s technology and execution strengths for effective planning and execution.

feed.title: Halliburton forms collaboration with PETRONAS Suriname and Valaris
feed.summary: Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) has partnered with PETRONAS Suriname Exploration & Production BV and Valaris to develop PETRONAS Suriname's local assets. This collaboration aims to integrate their respective expertise early in the development lifecycle to enhance project readiness, execution performance, and value creation in Suriname. The agreement focuses on combining PETRONAS Suriname's basin knowledge, Valaris' drilling capabilities, and Halliburton's technology to maximize the asset's long-term value.

feed.title: 10 high schools get financial literacy labs in Synchrony’s $2M push
feed.summary: Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) has committed an additional $2 million to its Empowering Financial Futures program, bringing the total funding to $3 million. This initiative will establish 10 Financial Literacy Labs in high schools, provide $1 million for teacher development and resources, and nearly $1 million for free financial counseling services for public school teachers. The program aims to enhance K-12 personal finance education nationwide, partnering with various nonprofits and utilizing employee volunteers.

feed.title: TOWER TRUST & INVESTMENT Co Acquires Shares of 9,811 Emerson Electric Co. $EMR
feed.summary: TOWER TRUST & INVESTMENT Co has acquired a new position of 9,811 shares in Emerson Electric Co. (NYSE:EMR) during the fourth quarter, valued at approximately $1.302 million and making it the 27th largest holding in their portfolio. Several research firms have issued positive ratings and raised price targets for Emerson Electric, with a consensus target price of $163.43. The company also reported Q4 EPS that topped estimates and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.555 per share.

feed.title: Mink Brook entities disclose 2.24M-share stake in Heritage Global (HGBL)
feed.summary: Mink Brook entities have disclosed a shared beneficial ownership of 2,238,256 shares, or a 6.4% stake, in Heritage Global (HGBL) through a Schedule 13G/A filing. This ownership is held by Mink Brook Asset Management LLC, Mink Brook Capital GP LLC, William Mueller, Mink Brook Partners LP, and Mink Brook Opportunity Fund LP. The filing clarifies that while there is shared voting and dispositive power, direct beneficial ownership is disclaimed except to the extent of pecuniary interests, with percentages calculated based on 34,741,553 outstanding shares as of March 31, 2026.
